theme_and_archetype.description: Warm, artisan-forward, hand-verified bazaar. Moving away from big-box tech minimalism (Amazon clone) to an editorial, culturally authentic, and trust-centered Indian marketplace aesthetic.

headings.description: Elegant serif conveying heritage, craftsmanship, and trust. Used for Hero headings, Section Titles, and Brand Wordmark.

body.description: Clean, geometric sans-serif for high legibility in dense marketplace data (product titles, prices, descriptions, inputs).

header.layout: Sticky, top-0, z-50. bg-[#FAFAF5] border-b border-[#E8E2D9]. No navy blue.
header.search_bar: Rounded-full, border border-[#E8E2D9] bg-white, focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#C2533A]. Include primary CTA button (Terracotta) inside the search pill on the right.
header.pincode_chip: Pill shape, bg-[#F3EFEA] text-[#2C2420] flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium.
header.category_strip: Horizontal scrollable list. Manrope text-sm font-medium text-[#7A7067]. Active item gets text-[#C2533A] and a bottom border.

trust_ribbons.shape: Scalloped-edge badge or organic 'wax seal' shape using CSS mask-image, SVG, or rounded-br-2xl rounded-tl-2xl instead of generic sharp ribbons.
trust_ribbons.colors: Identity Verified = Terracotta (#C2533A) bg, White text. FSSAI/GSTIN Verified = Sage Green (#5C7E6A) bg, White text.
trust_ribbons.animation: Stamp press effect on click/hover (scale-95, slight rotation).

product_card.container: bg-white rounded-xl border border-[#E8E2D9] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_-4px_rgba(194,83,58,0.15)] hover:-translate-y-1 group
product_card.title: Manrope font-semibold text-[#2C2420] line-clamp-2 leading-tight
product_card.cta: w-full rounded-full bg-[#C2533A] text-white py-2.5 font-semibold transition-colors hover:bg-[#A6432D] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
product_card.pincode_line: text-xs text-[#7A7067] flex items-center gap-1 mt-1

hero.layout: Asymmetric 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A). Not a standard full-width banner.
hero.main_image: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
hero.text_content: Absolute positioned over the gradient, left aligned. Large Cormorant H1, Manrope subtitle.
hero.side_cards: col-span-4 row-span-1 bg-[#F3EFEA] rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-center border border-[#E8E2D9]

forms.inputs: bg-[#FAFAF5] border border-[#E8E2D9] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C2533A] focus:border-transparent transition-all
forms.cards: bg-white border border-[#E8E2D9] rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-soft

micro_interactions.hover_states: All buttons should have a slight background darkening. Product cards lift up and gain a warm, terracotta-tinted shadow.
micro_interactions.trust_badges: Stamp animation: hover triggers a very slight scale-up, active triggers a scale-95 'press' effect.
micro_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids using framer-motion.

imagery.description: Colorful powdered spices on display. Use for Kirana/Food section or main hero banner.
Man working on a weaving machine. Great for Handloom category feature or side card in hero grid.
Potter's hands on a wheel. Use for Handicrafts category or as a product sample.
Pile of Indian textiles. Use as a product image placeholder.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over the warm background (#FAFAF5) meets APCA contrast standards. Terracotta (#C2533A) against white is accessible.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements (buttons, links, search bars, category tabs, toggles) must have data-testid attributes in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use the default Tailwind blue, gray, or the old Amazon navy/orange.
Implement the Header exactly as described: sticky, solid warm background, pill-shaped search, and distinct typography.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Ensure these are loaded in the project (e.g., via Google Fonts in index.html).
Replace generic ribbon shapes with organic 'scalloped' or 'stamp/seal' styled elements for Trust Badges.
Ensure the hero section uses an asymmetrical grid (like Tetris mode) with high-quality imagery and a gradient overlay for text readability.
Use lucide-react icons with a stroke width of 1.5 to maintain an elegant, crafted feel.
